allow: PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq\\lib\\products.json"; try { $stream = [System.IO.File]::Open\($file, 'Open', 'Write', 'None'\); $stream.Close\(\); "File is not locked" } catch { "File is locked: $_" })

PowerShell($file = "C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq\\lib\\products.json"; $maxTries = 20; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $maxTries; $i++\) { try { $stream = [System.IO.File]::Open\($file, 'Open', 'Write', 'None'\); $stream.Close\(\); "File became available after $i retries"; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200 } })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq\\lib\\products.json"; try { $fs = [System.IO.File]::Open\($path, 'Open', 'ReadWrite', 'None'\); $fs.Close\(\); "FILE IS NOT LOCKED" } catch { "FILE IS LOCKED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq\\lib\\products.json"; for \($i=1; $i -le 10; $i++\) { try { $fs = [System.IO.File]::Open\($path, 'Open', 'ReadWrite', 'None'\); $fs.Close\(\); "Attempt $i`: UNLOCKED"; break } catch { "Attempt $i`: locked"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq"; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\97252\\Desktop\\trailiq'; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Write-Host "Dev server started")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/video" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object videoUrl, posterUrl, photographer, duration)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Server OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Not ready yet: $_" })
